title: Amtech G0230 150mm (6") Pointing trowel with soft grip
features: DURABLE AND COMFORTABLE TO USE: This 150mm (6") pointing trowel has a hardened and tempered steel blade with a soft grip for added comfort and ease of use
STEEL BODY: Durable construction provides strength for long-term performance
SIZE CAPACITY: 6 inch / 150 mm range ideal for household and trade applications
PRECISION PERFORMANCE: Provides smooth and accurate results
PLUMBING APPLICATIONS: Essential for household and trade pipework
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning Always wear appropriate safety gear when using this tool. Keep away from children and pets. Do not use for purposes other than intended. Store in a dry place when not in use. Box Contains 1x Trowel See more
